items.title: Looks like Wizards salary dump of Russell into the megatrade lets Wizards take both Ayton and Middleton into Olynyk TPE that expires in 48 hours, and then create two new 6.0M exceptions for Jaden Hardy and Russell. Russell is Griz's 20th contract and presumably headed for buyout.
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt: Looks like Wizards salary dump of Russell into the megatrade lets Wizards take both Ayton and Middleton into Olynyk TPE that expires in 48 hours, and then create two new 6.0M exceptions for Jaden Hardy and Russell. Russell is Griz's 20th contract and presumably headed for buyout.

items.title: The Dorian Finney-Smith trade and the Deandre Ayton-Jaden Hardy trade were our 28th and 29th trades agreed to this offseason.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
The Dorian Finney-Smith trade and the Deandre Ayton-Jaden Hardy trade were our 28th and 29th trades agreed to this offseason.

Some of these deals are probably going to end up getting tied together in multi-team deals, but we'll end up in excess of 20 trades easily.

items.title: [Charania] Just in: The Los Angeles Lakers are trading Deandre Ayton to the Washington Wizards for Jaden Hardy and two Wizards second-round picks in 2031 and 2032, sources tell ESPN.
items.author: curryybacon
items.body_excerpt: Shams Charania: Just in: The Los Angeles Lakers are trading Deandre Ayton to the Washington Wizards for Jaden Hardy and two Wizards second-round picks in 2031 and 2032, sources tell ESPN. Source: https://www.espn.com/contributor/shams-charania
